creator: W.Belgers@nl.cis.philips.com
text:
File /usr/src/sys/i386/boot/biosboot/boot.c
To boot sd0 when wd0 is installed variable BOOT_HD must be set (line
111) but comment in boot.c mentions BOOT_HT (line 107).

Fix: 

107c107
< 	* Define BOOT_HD to boot sd0 when wd0 is also installed		*
---
> 	* Define BOOT_HT to boot sd0 when wd0 is also installed		*
